user_query: My company is planning to invest in the stock market. Can you provide us with the financial health, key ratios, and key stats for the stock with performanceId 0P0000OQN8? Additionally, we'd like to know the effective spread and book details of this stock. Lastly, fetch the 24-hour trading data to help us make an informed decision.

TaskList.description: Fetch the financial health, key ratios, and key stats for the stock with performanceId 0P0000OQN8.
Retrieve the effective spread of the stock with performanceId 0P0000OQN8.
Get the book details of the stock with performanceId 0P0000OQN8.
Fetch the 24-hour trading data for the stock with performanceId 0P0000OQN8.
